name: CONODIA Natural Wooden chew Play Toy for Parrot Birds
description: Made of 100% natural materials with non-toxic compositions.Food grade colour. | Fun toy designed to provide your bird with plenty of mental and physical activity. | Features multiple shapes and colors for your feathered friend to chew on and play with. | Contains wooden blocks with wooden beads and cotton rope in a variety of colors for multiple textures. | SIZE-- 10 INCH LENGTH.
